title: Rebuild image scans thread
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild image scans thread             Quote Post by Lagann » Sun Apr 12, 2009 3:44 pm New Newtype Scan http://moe.imouto.org/post/show/69727/a ... angelion-s There's Rei and her book again, and now Asuka got one.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Apr 12, 2009 3:50 pm Maybe Rei and Asuka are Shinigamis?

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Apr 12, 2009 4:12 pm hmm, whats that smile on shinji-kun's face mean....... "Hmmm 2 passed out girls, me likey"

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 12, 2009 4:53 pm Why is Asuka reading something in what look like Swedish?? (Den Franska Maten)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Apr 12, 2009 4:56 pm Looks like Asuka is ready to slip over onto Rei's shoulder. Rude awakening on deck...

[]:             Quote Post by majlund » Sun Apr 12, 2009 5:05 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Why is Asuka reading something in what look like Swedish?? (Den Franska Maten)

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Sun Apr 12, 2009 5:06 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Why is Asuka reading something in what look like Swedish?? (Den Franska Maten)

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Apr 12, 2009 5:13 pm Asuka must've stolen that cookbook from Shinji. I mean, he seems to be the only guy who actually knows how to cook in the show.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 12, 2009 5:27 pm The Goose wrote: he seems to be the only guy who actually knows how to cook

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Sun Apr 12, 2009 5:46 pm A Swedish translation of a book by an English chef about French cooking. Conspiracy, perhaps? @Tines: the skit with the live spaghetti is my all-time favorite.

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Sun Apr 12, 2009 5:50 pm Uh... how exactly do we know that this is a Newtype scan/Rebuild related? And if it is, where's the rest of the article (or do they usually have stand-alone pictures)?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Apr 12, 2009 6:18 pm Newtype's articles tend to have the text written over the images (I have one issue of Newtype Japan and about 20 or so issues of Newtype USA laying around my room). Though I'm curious about the exact sauce myself. At any rate, pretty picture is pretty.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Apr 12, 2009 6:29 pm Hey, Shinji's actually smiling.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Apr 12, 2009 7:19 pm A smiling Shinji? Must be an imposter! Get outta there Wanna-Shinji!! All kidding aside, yes, nice picture. ...I wonder if Mari or Kaworu is hanging out in the tree above them (Kaworu of course would be naked)

[]:             Quote Post by TheLobe » Sun Apr 12, 2009 7:36 pm asukas watch is hideous. Green and Red. and here i was thinking everything baout asukas colour scheme was so well thought out.

[]:             Quote Post by Lagann » Sun Apr 12, 2009 7:42 pm http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-439.html Its a scan of a poster from the latest Newtype

[]:             Quote Post by Joppu » Sun Apr 12, 2009 8:26 pm Protip: use the original huge image: http://imgkk.com/images/mfl2t55w.jpg (4070x5433, 2.8 MB) Oh and the book: Den franska maten = The French food (yeah I do know swedish) but below: kächenchef Eabern Reeve ok, it's Küchenchef Eileen Reece , thanks for corrections oh and Bonniers, that's a real book company

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Apr 12, 2009 9:11 pm That says Kuchenchef (with an umlaut) Eileen Reeve. That's the name of the person who wrote it, I believe.

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Sun Apr 12, 2009 9:26 pm Must be Reece. Possibly Eileen Reece, French Family Cooking , London, 1979. (Not sure if I got the right book, since I can't read Swedish, but it is definitely a Swedish edition of a UK book).

[]:             Quote Post by Joppu » Sun Apr 12, 2009 9:29 pm Küchenchef apparently means chef Thanks for correcting my lousy reading. So it's The French food (or cuisine, how do you want to translate it) by Chef Eileen Reece and Asuka's reading it in swedish? Weird...
